goals: Map the cheapest feasible feedstock options for Flavonoid
Identify procurement risks before strain work scales up
Align sourcing choices with fermentation performance constraints

project_context.project_goal: draft experiment plan for a project to engineer flavonoid production in yeast
project_context.focus_area: Raw material strategy and low-cost carbon input selection
starter_questions: Which carbon sources and co-feeds can lower cost without hurting downstream biology?
What regional sourcing risks or by-product opportunities should we account for first?
